title: 验证 FR-01 动态股票池维护
description: 作为系统维护者，希望有一个高效的批量更新机制来刷新目标日期的股票池，确保数据准确，支持 FR-04/FR-06 用户实现实时 200 股核心池。
acceptanceCriteria: 首先查询 kline_daily 目标 trade_date 执行 POST /api/v1/admin/pool/refresh 有效，创建 stock_pool_refresh_task 和 stock_pool_snapshot 相同 pool_version，核心 pool_role='core' 200 股，备用 pool_role='standby' 50 股。
GET /api/v1/pool/stocks?trade_date=<trade_date> 返回 items 真实 pool_date/pool_version，非管理员用户可访问，应同时返回 fallback_from 和 status_reason 字段，避免 200 假成功。
执行验证数据批量更新动态池 API 数据库，禁止使用 test helper 直接 SQL 写入 stock_pool_snapshot 表成功。
notes: {"group":"FR01_RUNTIME","dependsOn":["US-034","US-035","US-036","US-037","US-038"],"endpoints":["POST /api/v1/admin/pool/refresh","GET /api/v1/pool/stocks?trade_date={trade_date}"],"models":["stock_pool_refresh_task","stock_pool_snapshot","stock_master","kline_daily"],"permissions":["admin","system","public_read"],"errorCodes":["COLD_START_ERROR","CONCURRENT_CONFLICT","VALIDATION_ERROR"],"idempotency":"trade_date refresh may reuse latest successful task; snapshot rows stay keyed by trade_date+pool_version+stock_code+pool_role","enums":["core","standby","SUCCESS","FALLBACK"],"thresholds":"corePoolSize=200,standbyPoolSize=50,targetTradeDateMustHaveKline=true","degradation":"fallback_from and status_reason must stay explicit; no seed-helper writes to runtime DB","exampleAssert":"assert core_count>=200 and standby_count>=50 and api_items_count>0","pytest":"python -m pytest tests/test_fr01_pool_refresh.py tests/test_compat_public_endpoints.py -q --tb=short"}
